creator: rosenke@dssgmbh.de
text:
Hello,

the missing shared object is caused by gtkglext, it seems anydesk needs a depedency on this. But after installing thsi port anydesk still fails, ~/.anydesk/anydesk.trace is attached, error seems to be:

explode 2022-03-02 16:17:54.703         ad          2942 101570                       base.modulename - Error finding executable.

Comment order seems to be messed up, something wrent wrong as i posted this here.
